creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can we also have a "superseded by" state? (yes typos wheee)
Duplicated comes close but not quite..

see the following bugs are example:
Update link-grammer to
5.0.3 https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=188642
5.0.4 https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=188738
5.0.6 https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=188840

The 5.0.3 and 5.0.4 should be able to be marked superseded by the 5.0.6 update.
